commits: 768853c: feat(session-history): retain message history after session clear
summary: Implemented Issue #168 session history retention using TDD approach. Key changes: (1) DB migration v22 adds archived column to chat_messages with composite index. (2) deleteAllMessages and deleteMessagesByCliTool changed from physical DELETE to logical UPDATE archived=1, with function names preserved for backward compatibility. (3) ACTIVE_FILTER constant ensures consistent archived=0 filtering across all read queries. (4) getMessages refactored to options object pattern with includeArchived parameter. (5) clearLastUserMessage added for sidebar cleanup. (6) kill-session API updated to call clearLastUserMessage after archiving. (7) messages API accepts includeArchived query parameter. (8) HistoryPane UI adds toggle checkbox with localStorage persistence and opacity-60 for archived messages. All 5272 unit tests pass, 0 lint errors, 0 new TypeScript errors.
message: TDD implementation complete. All acceptance criteria addressed: session history retained after clear, showArchived toggle with localStorage, archived messages visually distinct, sidebar unaffected, existing tests updated and passing.
